title: Bump Catatonit up to v0.1.7
body:
#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Bump up catatonia to version 0.1.7 in CI for https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12218

#### How to verify it

CI tests will pass

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

The VM images will pick up and cache the new version when they're built next, after this PR is merged.

LGTM, but I think you will need to drop f33 support.

> LGTM, but I think you will need to drop f33 support.

This is being handled in https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11795
